continuity.def: 連續性、連貫性的人物 (單數)
continuity.ex: The movie has a minor local continuity error.

continuo.def: (樂)數字低音、通奏低音人物 (單數)
continuo.ex: The basso continuo was played by a cello.

continuous.ex: There was a continuous stream of visitors.

continuously.ex: The pump managed to run continuously today.

continuum.ex: The space-time continuum is a complex idea.

contort.ex: The pain managed to contort his face tonight.

contorted.def: 扭曲的、歪曲的人的人 (或物)
contorted.ex: He used some very contorted local logic.

contortion.ex: The clown made a funny facial contortion.

contortionist.def: 軟體表演者、身體能扭曲者人物 (單數)

contour.def: 輪廓、等高線、外形的人的人人物 (單數)
contour.ex: Follow the contour of the hill on the map.

contraband.def: 違禁品、走私的人的人的人物 (單數)
contraband.ex: The dog found illegal smuggled contraband.

contraception.ex: New methods of contraception are available.

contraceptive.def: 避孕的、避孕劑人物 (單數)
contraceptive.ex: She started taking an oral contraceptive.

contract.def: 合約、收縮、感染、訂約的人的人人物 (單數) (約)
contract.col: under contract, breach of contract, signed contract
contract.ex: He signed a new long research contract today.

contracted.def: 契約的、縮小了的人的人 (或物)
contracted.ex: They suffered from several contracted debts.

contractile.ex: Muscle is a vital type of contractile tissue.

contraction.def: 收縮、縮寫、感染、陣痛人物 (單數)
contraction.ex: He felt a sharp muscular contraction tonight.

contractor.def: 承包商、訂約者人物 (單數)
contractor.ex: The building contractor started work today.

contractual.def: 契約的人、合約的人的人物
contractual.ex: We have a firm contractual obligation now.

contractually.ex: They are bound contractually to stay today.

contradict.ex: Try not to contradict yourself in speech.

contradiction.ex: There was a direct contradiction in facts.

contradictory.def: 矛盾的人、反對的人的人物 (反)
contradictory.ex: The police had very contradictory evidence.

contradistinction.ex: Use blue in contradistinction to red today.

contrail.def: 凝結尾(飛機雲)人物 (單數)
contrail.ex: A long white contrail appeared in sky.

contralto.def: (樂)女低音、女低音歌手人物 (單數)
contralto.ex: The singer has a very rich deep contralto.

contraption.def: 奇怪的裝置、新奇設計人物 (單數)
contraption.ex: He built a strange contraption in yard.

contrapuntal.ex: Bach is famous for contrapuntal music.

contrariety.def: 相反、矛盾物的人物 (單數)
contrariety.ex: A strange contrariety of logic occurred.

contrarily.ex: He acted contrarily to all of my advice.

contrary.def: 相反的、對立的、相反事物的人的人物 (反)
contrary.col: on the contrary, contrary to, to the contrary
contrary.ex: The facts are contrary to his statement.

contrast.def: 對比、對照、差異人物 (單數)
contrast.col: in contrast to, sharp contrast, color contrast
contrast.ex: There was a sharp contrast in the views.

contrasted.def: 對比了的、對照的人的人 (或物)
contrasted.ex: The contrasted colors looked very nice.

contrasting.def: 對比的、不協調的人 (或物)
contrasting.ex: The two reports gave contrasting news.

contravene.def: 違反、違背(法律)的人的人

contravention.ex: This is in direct contravention of law.

contretemps.def: 意外、尷尬事、小爭執人物 (單數)
contretemps.ex: A minor contretemps occurred at party today.

contribute.def: 貢獻、投稿、捐助的人的人
contribute.ex: Please contribute to the local charity today.

contribution.def: 貢獻、捐款、投稿人物 (單數)
contribution.ex: He made a major contribution to science.

contributor.def: 貢獻者、投稿人人物 (單數)
contributor.ex: He is a regular contributor to the paper.

contributory.def: 有助的、促成的人的人物 (單數)
contributory.ex: Stress is a major contributory factor here.

contrite.ex: He spoke in a very contrite and soft voice.

contritely.ex: He apologized contritely for his mistake.

contrition.ex: The judge wanted him to show contrition.

contrivance.def: 發明、計策、新奇裝置人物 (單數)
contrivance.ex: The device was an ingenious contrivance.

contrive.def: 謀劃、發明、設法做到的人的人
contrive.ex: They managed to contrive a clever scheme.

contrived.def: 人為的、做作的人的人 (或物)
contrived.ex: The movie plot felt a bit too contrived.

control.def: 控制、管理、操縱、抑制的人的人人物 (單數) (管)
control.col: remote control, out of control, under control, take control
control.ex: The fire is finally under control today.
